use_cases: Full-screen hero backgrounds for landing pages requiring visual impact
Atmospheric backgrounds for creative and portfolio websites
Visual anchors for marketing and promotional pages
Decorative hero sections for SaaS and product launches
Eye-catching header backgrounds for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: A full-screen hero background component featuring flowing liquid shapes that create an animated aurora effect. This decorative hero element provides visual impact through its atmospheric gradient shapes, making it ideal for landing pages and marketing sites that require striking visual presence.
